title: Glazed Indian Almond Toast
description: A simple nutty toast topped with a sweet almond glaze, perfect for a quick snack or light breakfast.
instructions: Dust each slice of bread lightly with plain flour.
Heat a skillet over medium heat and melt the butter.
Place the bread slices in the skillet and toast until golden on both sides, about 3 minutes per side.
Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine honey, sugar, water, and a pinch of salt; stir until the sugar dissolves.
Add the sliced almonds to the glaze and stir to coat evenly.
Remove the toasted bread from the skillet and spread the almond glaze over the hot surface, letting it caramelize for 30 seconds.
Serve immediately, optionally topping with extra toasted almonds.
